summary: Live volume restoration and chart stability fixes for IB streaming.
release_notes: Restored live volume updates by wiring hvol keepUpToDate subscriptions into the market-data subscription lifecycle, so field 87 now updates in real time for active symbols.
Hardened candle-volume mapping in the chart so active-bar volume is computed from cumulative field 87 anchored per candle bucket.
Removed synthetic timer-drawn volume bars so volume appears only when real market volume data is received.
Reduced live price jumpiness by preferring trade-tick-driven price updates when recent trade ticks are available.
